prompt: EDIT the attached source banner with TWO minimal changes and PRESERVE EVERYTHING ELSE EXACTLY. CHANGES: (1) Significantly darken the swirling magic background and tone down the runic-circle glow — keep all the elements (runes, swirls, sparkles) but render them deeper purple and more muted so the character is clearly the focal point and the corners fade to a deep navy-black (#0A0B1E). (2) Remove the small white download icon in the bottom-right corner and replace it with the matching dark background. KEEP UNCHANGED: the cartoony purple demon-jester (cheeky teeth-showing grin, small horns, gold crown, purple-and-gold collar with central gem), the jester staff with mini-jester-head topper in the left hand, the fan of playing cards in the right hand, the runic-circle composition, the JOKR display text at the bottom, the wide horizontal banner aspect. Make ONLY those two edits.
text_response_excerpt: Here is the edited banner with the darkened background and removed download icon.
